title: USS Gerald Ford returns Norfolk after 11-month record deployment — longest since Vietnam, Iran war + Maduro capture, Presidential Unit Citation
snippet: USS Gerald R. Ford, world's largest aircraft carrier, returned to Naval Station Norfolk after 326 days at sea — longest post-Vietnam carrier deployment. Ship served as platform for wave after wave of fighter jets during Iran war, also participated in Maduro capture in Venezuela. 5,000 sailors returned to families. Received Presidential Unit Citation for 'outstanding performance in action'. Experienced onboard fire and plumbing issues during deployment.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 USS Ford 귀환 보도 없음. 완전 신규 사건.
